title: SACRAMENTO, CA —
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Nearly one in three California college students face food and housing insecurity.",
    "One in five California State University (CSU) students experience hunger.",
    "One in five University of California (UC) students do not have access to adequate food or nutrition.",
    "Almost 3 out of every 5 students said they were experiencing basic needs insecurity during the pandemic.",
    "74% of Indigenous students reported facing basic needs insecurity.",
    "71% of Black students reported facing basic needs insecurity.",
    "The federal Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) denies CalFresh eligibility to all college students unless they are working at least 20 hours a week or are eligible for certain exemptions.",
    "A little over 170 programs are currently approved for CalFresh eligibility in California.",
    "There are over 9,000 potentially qualifying programs hosted by the California Community Colleges (CCCs)."
  ]
}
```
